name: io.github.forgemeshlabs/x402-notary-mcp
description: Cryptographic receipts for AI outputs on Base or Solana via x402.

environmentVariables.name: WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Dedicated low-balance Base wallet private key for x402 USDC micropayments. Optional — verification tools work without it. Never use your primary wallet.

environmentVariables.name: NOTARY_RAIL
environmentVariables.description: Payment rail: base or solana. Defaults to base, or solana when NOTARY_BASE_URL contains notary-solana.

environmentVariables.name: NOTARY_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Notary API origin. Use https://notary.forgemesh.io for Base or https://notary-solana.forgemesh.io for Solana.

environmentVariables.name: SOLANA_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Dedicated low-balance Solana keypair for x402 USDC micropayments. Supports JSON byte array, base58, base64, or hex. Optional — verification tools work without it.
